x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Runbook automation enables Now Assist TSOM AI Agents to execute automated remediation. Without runbooks, AI Agent TSOM actions are limited to alerts and routing.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){try{if(!gs.tableExists("sn_si_trigger")){return{status:"needs_validation",actualValue:"Table not found",finding:"sn_si_trigger table not present -- manual verification required. Confirm Runbook Automation is installed and active."};}var gr=new GlideRecord("sn_si_trigger");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n>=10?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" active runbook triggers",finding:n<10?"Only "+n+" active runbook triggers. Now Assist TSOM AI Agents use runbook routing rules for automated remediation -- low count limits AI action scope.":n+" active runbook triggers -- Now Assist TSOM AI Agents can execute automated remediation.";};}catch(e){return{status:"needs_validation",actualValue:"Check failed",finding:"Script execution error: "+e.message};};})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure runbooks for key alert types via sa_runbook_list.do. Automate top repetitive remediation tasks. Now Assist TSOM AI Agents leverage runbooks for automated remediation.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_47f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cc5
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Runbook automation enables Now Assist TSOM AI Agents to execute automated remediation. Without runbooks, AI Agent TSOM actions are limited to alerts and routing.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Runbook Automation Configuration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){try{if(!gs.tableExists("sn_si_trigger")){return{status:"needs_validation",actualValue:"Table not found",finding:"sn_si_trigger table not present -- manual verification required. Confirm Runbook Automation is installed and active."};}var gr=new GlideRecord("sn_si_trigger");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n>=10?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" active runbook triggers",finding:n<10?"Only "+n+" active runbook triggers. Now Assist TSOM AI Agents use runbook routing rules for automated remediation -- low count limits AI action scope.":n+" active runbook triggers -- Now Assist TSOM AI Agents can execute automated remediation.";};}catch(e){return{status:"needs_validation",actualValue:"Check failed",finding:"Script execution error: "+e.message};};})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>AIOPS</module><number>CHK0000446</number><order>40</order><remediation_guidance>Configure runbooks for key alert types via sa_runbook_list.do. Automate top repetitive remediation tasks. Now Assist TSOM AI Agents leverage runbooks for automated remediation.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>47f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cc5</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Runbook Automation Configuration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_47f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cc5</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
